title: rubus × illicitus
intro: Rubus × illicitus, also known as the black raspberry or black raspberry hybrid, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between Rubus argutus and Rubus allegheniensis. The medicinal properties of Rubus × illicitus include its high concentration of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its content of ellagic acid, a compound with potential anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × illicitus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus × illicitus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or jam, making it a versatile ingredient in various herbal remedies and culinary applications.
